properties.tree_description: The subject tree is a mature oak located within close proximity to adjacent residential structures. At the base of the trunk, multiple fungal fruiting bodies are present, including decayed conks and active fungal growth emerging from the root flare. These indicators are consistent with internal decay within the lower trunk and root system. Given the location of the fungal activity, decay is likely affecting structural root wood, which is critical for overall tree stability.
